text_content: No separate Design Output Review (DOR) will be performed for this project. An approval of the MRD revision after V&V completion shall confirm that the design output activities have passed and closed.  However, Design Transfer Reviews will be conducted as part of this project. To expedite NMPA submission timeline, this project plans to conduct two separate design transfer reviews for efficient utilization of time and resources. Hence, 1st DTR will be conducted prior to NMPA submission focusing on completing all mandatory deliverables and documents per NMPA requirements (including manufacturing deliverables) and 2nd DTR will be conducted post NMPA submission ensuring completion of all remaining deliverables. Refer to supporting document - HAL 4.0MR2 (HAL Evolve) project schedule detailing tasks under each DTR. text_content: HAL 4.0 MR1 is a maintenance release to address findings from the preclinical evaluation, customer facing issues and backlog items. This program is not intended to include items driven by new, modified, or deleted requirements or features and will NOT require a 510K submission.  The changes introduced are software only and do not impact hardware.

text_content: Main control of content for accuracy, completeness, and quality is through reviews, internal and formal; UAD keystroking and tryout of new or changed features and procedures. text_content: The software used in this product strictly follows Varian's established design and development process. In conclusion, there is no change in the safety and effectiveness of this software.
